# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type RequestBody = {
  content?: string | string[];
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  delayMs?: number;
};

const encoder = new TextEncoder();

function toHeaderRecord(input: unknown): Record<string, string> {
  if (!input || typeof input !== 'object' || Array.isArray(input)) return {};
  const out: Record<string, string> = {};
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(input as Record<string, unknown>)) {
    if (typeof value === 'string') out[key] = value;
  }
  return out;
}

function toChunks(content: unknown): string[] {
  if (typeof content === 'string') return [content];
  if (Array.isArray(content)) return content.filter((v): v is string => typeof v === 'string');
  return [];
}

function sleep(ms: number) {
  return new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response('Method Not Allowed', {
      status: 405,
      headers: { Allow: 'POST' },
    });
  }

  let body: RequestBody;
  try {
    body = (await req.json()) as RequestBody;
  } catch {
    return new Response('Invalid JSON body', { status: 400 });
  }

  const chunks = toChunks(body.content);
  const userHeaders = toHeaderRecord(body.headers);
  const delayMs = typeof body.delayMs === 'number' && body.delayMs >= 0 ? body.delayMs : 0;

  const responseHeaders = new Headers({
    'content-type': 'text/plain; charset=utf-8',
    'cache-control': 'no-cache, no-transform',
    'x-content-type-options': 'nosniff',
  });

  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(userHeaders)) {
    responseHeaders.set(key, value);
  }

  const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    async start(controller) {
      if (chunks.length === 0) {
        controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(''));
        controller.close();
        return;
      }

      for (const chunk of chunks) {
        controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(chunk));
        if (delayMs > 0) await sleep(delayMs);
      }

      controller.close();
    },
    cancel() {},
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    status: 200,
    headers: responseHeaders,
  });
}
